{{CargoOrgan
|name=Scale of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10690
|idx=48
|description="We crossed ancient abysses and glacial lands, waged war with giants, made peace with mankind — and through it all, the dragon scale granted us supreme protection."
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Before round start, summon Dragon's Breath, reducing the enemy's DEF by 52% this round!
|hp=1772
|def=192
|atk=320
|rush=156
|gene1=Snail Arena, Total Power Checks -6%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, HIT +9%
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} RUSH +140
|gene4=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +3%
|gene5=Snail Arena, dodge rate +9%
|gene7=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +3% (Awakened)
|}}
